Our Mission

Bridging Science & Sustainable Farming

ISBACS promotes bio-agro chemical sciences through research, seminars, workshops, and digital platforms — making scientific knowledge accessible to farmers and researchers alike.

🔬

Research & Education

Promoting bio-agro chemical research and publishing scientific journals

🌾

Farmer Empowerment

Training farmers in safe eco-friendly agricultural practices

💻

Digital Outreach

E-learning and digital tools for sharing knowledge widely

🤝

Collaboration

National & international partnerships for scientific advancement

About the Society

Who We Are

The Indian Society of Bio Agro Chemical Sciences (ISBACS) is a registered nonprofit organization based in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh. Founded to bridge the gap between modern agricultural science and practical farming, ISBACS works to promote safe, sustainable, and scientifically advanced agricultural practices.

The society brings together professors, researchers, scientists, and students committed to the advancement of bio-agro chemical sciences for the benefit of farmers and the environment.

🌱Promote bio-agro chemical research & education
♻️Develop eco-friendly agricultural chemicals
🌿Popularize bio-fertilizers & green technology
🎓Knowledge exchange among scientists & students
📰Publish research journals & bulletins for free
🛡️Natural resource conservation & environment
💻Digital platforms for e-learning & knowledge
👩‍🔬Empower women scientists & young researchers
